title: Yeetus Narratus
description: Yeetus Narratus is a client-side QoL mod, that allows you to Re-bind the Narrator and removes the annoying Accessibility prompt on first start up.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c81375e654247e725a2f903256a7268e73203c0e.png) ##


**Yeetus Narrator**: is a small, client side QOL mod that makes Minecraft’s accessibility onboarding less intrusive while keeping the Narrator fully usable when you actually want it. **Rebind Narrator toggle**: Minecraft’s Narrator toggle is normally locked to its default keybind. This mod adds the ability to rebind the Narrator toggle key, so you can choose a keybind that fits your layout and doesn’t conflict with other mods. **Skip the first start Accessibility screen**: On a fresh install, Minecraft shows the Accessibility screen on first startup (the one that leads into the Narrator prompt). This mod automatically skips that onboarding screen, so launching new modpacks uninterrupted. **What it does not do** - No menus - No extra features - No complicated setup Just a lightweight tweak to remove first run interruptions and give you control over the Narrator keybind.
